message:
🐛 Fix nightly E2E widget: use flashing blue for active jobs instead of solid yellow (#1065)

The widget export code and preview used yellow (#eab308) for in_progress
runs while the dashboard card correctly used blue (bg-blue-400) with
animate-pulse. This makes the widget consistent with the card.

- codeGenerator.ts: Change in_progress color from yellow to blue (#60a5fa),
  add pulse animation
- styleConverter.ts: Add @keyframes pulse to widget CSS
- WidgetExportModal.tsx: Update preview mock data and colors to use blue
  for in-progress dots with pulse animation

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
